engines.name: narsil
engines.keyword_setup: BM25 k1=0.9 b=0.4; Narsil english analyzer (Porter stemmer, 70-word stop list)

engines.name: elasticsearch
engines.keyword_setup: BM25 k1=0.9 b=0.4 (custom default similarity); Elasticsearch `english` analyzer (Porter stemmer, English stop words)

engines.name: meilisearch
engines.keyword_setup: Bucket-sort ranking rules (words, typo, proximity, attribute, sort, exactness), not BM25; _rankingScore for ordering; default typo tolerance and prefix search; no stemming or stop-word removal

engines.name: opensearch
engines.keyword_setup: BM25 k1=0.9 b=0.4 (custom default similarity, native Lucene BM25Similarity in 3.x); OpenSearch `english` analyzer (Porter stemmer, English stop words)

engines.name: typesense
engines.keyword_setup: Native token match/proximity scoring (text_match), not BM25; english locale, Snowball stemming enabled, default typo tolerance

rows.setup: BM25 k1=0.9 b=0.4; Narsil english analyzer (Porter stemmer, 70-word stop list)

rows.server_time_disclosure: response `took` field (integer-millisecond resolution; sub-millisecond searches floor to 0-1 ms)
rows.setup: BM25 k1=0.9 b=0.4 (custom default similarity); Elasticsearch `english` analyzer (Porter stemmer, English stop words)

rows.server_time_disclosure: client round-trip only (no server-side query time exposed)

rows.setup: Native token match/proximity scoring (text_match), not BM25; english locale, Snowball stemming enabled, default typo tolerance
HNSW over the shared precomputed vectors, full precision (SQ8 quantization off), cosine

rows.server_time_disclosure: response `took` field (integer-millisecond resolution; sub-millisecond searches floor to 0-1 ms)
rows.setup: dense_vector HNSW, similarity cosine, over the shared precomputed vectors

rows.server_time_disclosure: response `took` field (integer-millisecond resolution; sub-millisecond searches floor to 0-1 ms)
rows.setup: knn_vector HNSW (faiss engine, inner product on L2-normalized vectors = cosine), over the shared precomputed vectors

rows.server_time_disclosure: top-level `time` field (seconds, converted to ms) (floating-millisecond resolution)
rows.setup: HNSW dense vectors, distance Cosine, over the shared precomputed vectors

rows.server_time_disclosure: client round-trip only (no server-side query time exposed)
rows.setup: HNSW dense vectors, distance cosine, over the shared precomputed vectors
BM25 (text) fused with HNSW vector search via Reciprocal Rank Fusion

rows.server_time_disclosure: response `took` field (integer-millisecond resolution; sub-millisecond searches floor to 0-1 ms)
rows.setup: BM25 match fused with dense_vector kNN via the RRF retriever

rows.server_time_disclosure: response `took` field (integer-millisecond resolution; sub-millisecond searches floor to 0-1 ms)
rows.setup: BM25 match fused with knn via a hybrid query and an RRF search pipeline

rows.server_time_disclosure: top-level `time` field (seconds, converted to ms) (floating-millisecond resolution)
rows.setup: Dense HNSW fused with BM25 sparse vectors (fastembed Qdrant/bm25, server IDF) via RRF

rows.server_time_disclosure: client round-trip only (no server-side query time exposed)
rows.setup: BM25 over text fused with dense vectors via the hybrid operator (rankedFusion, alpha=0.5)
